case_title: KELISKY, GREGORY S. VS TRANSPORTATION GUARANTEE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSPORTATION GUARANTEE COMPANY
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSPORTATION GUARANTEE COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,455.09 FILED BY KELISKY, GREGORY S. AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSPORTATION GUARANTEE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KELISKY, GREGORY S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRANSPORTATION GUARANTEE COMPANY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,555.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. CASE FILE CAN NOT BE FOUND THAT DAY. PLAINTIFF JUST SIGNED THE ENVELOP.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $11.90 AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSPORTATION GUARANTEE COMPANY
